Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 887

TLPL604 Teaching Science and Social Studies through Environmental Study (3 Credits)

Curriculum and instruction for science and social studies within a multicultural and environmental context; analysis of social studies

and science curriculum materials; utilization of school and community resources.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI695 or TLPL604.
